pemula: Fokus SELECT, DDL, CRUD, filter, sorting, dan agregasi dasar.
data_analyst: Fokus JOIN, subquery, agregasi, CTE, window function, dashboard KPI, dan validasi output.
backend_developer: Fokus schema, constraint, transaksi, procedure, trigger, security, dan migration.
dba_data_engineer: Fokus indexing, tuning, warehouse, backup, observability, governance, dan incident response.
